  1. Description

Package scorefour.controller

package scorefour.controller
Provides the controller classes to coordinate functionality between the game logic, models, and views.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AudioController
    A AudioController handles all audio of the game.
    BeadController
    BeadController manages a beads interactions, updates, and drawing.
    BoardController
    BoardController manages a boards interactions, updates, and drawing.
    ButtonController
    ButtonController manages a buttons interactions, updates, drawing, and user input handling.
    GameController
    GameController manages the play state interactions, updates, drawing, and user input handling.
    GameManager
    A GameManager handles the game moves, scoreboard, and win checks.
    MenuController
    MenuController manages the menu state interactions, updates, drawing, and user input handling.
    MouseInputs
    MouseInputs listens to various user inputs which occur in a designated Panel.
    OverlayController
    OverlayController manages the in game overlay interactions, updates, drawing, and user input handling.
    PegController
    A PegController handles all events related to the Peg.
    ProgramController
    The ProgramController manages the core logic of the program.
    WinManager
    A WinManager checks potential lines of the Board for wins.
